name: blendops
description: Safe Blender automation for AI agents: MCP tools, CLI workflows, scene inspection, preview, validation, and export.

scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @blendops/schemas && npm run clean --workspace @blendops/core && npm run clean --workspace @blendops/cli && npm run clean --workspace @blendops/mcp-server
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @blendops/schemas && npm run build --workspace @blendops/core
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @blendops/cli && npm run build --workspace @blendops/mcp-server
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace @blendops/schemas && npm run typecheck --workspace @blendops/core
scripts.typecheck:apps: npm run typecheck --workspace @blendops/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace @blendops/mcp-server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:apps
